name: distillery
description: Knowledge base skills for Claude Code — capture, search, and synthesize project knowledge

jina_api_key.title: Jina API Key
jina_api_key.description: Jina AI embedding API key. Obtain from https://jina.ai/api-key/

github_client_id.title: GitHub Client ID
github_client_id.description: GitHub OAuth app client ID for team access. Create at Settings > Developer settings > OAuth Apps

github_client_secret.title: GitHub Client Secret
github_client_secret.description: GitHub OAuth app client secret for team access. Found alongside the client ID in your OAuth App settings

hooks.command: echo '[Distillery v0.3.0] Knowledge base available. Skills: /recall (search), /pour (synthesize), /distill (capture), /classify (review queue), /radar (feed digest).'

sh -c 'J=$(cat); S=$(echo "$J" | grep -o "session_id[^,}]*" | cut -d: -f2 | sed s/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]//g); [ -z "$S" ] && exit 0; F=/tmp/distillery-prompt-count-$S; N=0; [ -f "$F" ] && N=$(cat "$F" 2>/dev/null); case "$N" in *[!0-9]*) N=0;; esac; N=$((N+1)); echo "$N" > "$F"; if [ $((N % 30)) -eq 0 ]; then echo "[Distillery] You have exchanged $N messages this session. Consider whether any decisions, insights, or corrections should be stored with /distill."; fi; exit 0'

echo '[Distillery] If this response produced decisions or insights, run /distill to capture them. If it surfaced interesting URLs, use /watch to add as a feed source or /bookmark to save as an entry.'
